name: mcp-server

env.placeholder: # run: moose generate hash-token, use the ENV API Key value

docs:
1. Generate auth tokens:  moose generate hash-token
     Copy the ENV API Key into .env.local as MCP_API_KEY.
  2. Start moose dev — your MCP server will be at http://localhost:4000/tools
  3. Add the chat UI:  moose add chat --dir <web-app-dir>
